title: Citrus Delight Sandwich
description: A simple and flavorful sandwich recipe featuring a citrus-infused delight filling.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. Open the jar of citrus delight and heat it in the skillet for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Meanwhile, toast the bun by placing it in the toaster or under the broiler for 1-2 minutes.
4. Spread the heated citrus delight on the toasted bun.
